body: Welcome to the Fall 2026 PRIDE cohort! We meet Tuesdays and Thursdays, 6:30-9pm, Oct 6 through Dec 10 at the BCDSS training room, 1910 North Broadway. Your workbook and parking pass are attached.
subject: Welcome to the Fall 2026 PRIDE Cohort

body: Thanks for a great Session 3 on attachment and grief. Recap notes are attached. For Thursday, please read Chapter 4 in the workbook and jot down one question you'd like to discuss as a group.
subject: Session 3 recap and Thursday prep

body: Just a reminder that Thursday's session covers the discipline and behavior module. Please bring your workbook and the home-safety checklist we handed out last week.
subject: Reminder: Thursday's PRIDE session

body: We're nearing the end of the cohort. Please take a few minutes to complete the end-of-cohort evaluation when you get a chance — the link is below. Your honest feedback helps me improve the next class.
subject: End-of-cohort evaluation

body: Congratulations on completing PRIDE pre-service training! Your certificate of completion is attached. The next steps for your home study and licensing are outlined on the second page. So proud of this group.
subject: Congratulations — your PRIDE certificate

body: Quick logistics note: this week's session has moved to the second-floor conference room while the usual training room gets its AV fixed. Same time, 6:30pm. Signs will be posted at the Broadway entrance.
subject: Room change for this week's session

body: We had a few questions after class about the workbook reprints. If your workbook is missing pages or you need a replacement, just reply here and I'll get one to you at Thursday's session.
subject: Workbook replacements
